About: It is about a war film directed by Sam Peckinpah.
It is about the class conflict between a newly arrived, aristocratic Prussian officer and a cynical, battle-hardened infantry NCO.
It is about the Eastern Front in World War II during the Soviets' Caucasus operations against the German Kuban bridgehead on the Taman Peninsula in late 1943.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Wehrmacht.
It is associated with the Eastern Front of World War II.
It is associated with the Soviets' Caucasus operations.
It is associated with the German Kuban bridgehead.
It is associated with the Taman Peninsula.
It is associated with the Battle of the Caucasus.
It is associated with the Kuban pocket.
It is associated with the Yugoslav People's Army.
It is associated with EMI Films.
It is associated with ITC Entertainment.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Sam Peckinpah.
DirectedBy: It was directed by Sam Peckinpah.
HasA: It has James Coburn.
It has Maximilian Schell.
It has James Mason.
It has David Warner.
It has Corporal Rolf Steiner.
It has Captain Stransky.
It has Colonel Brandt.
It has Captain Kiesel.
It has Lieutenant Triebig.
It has Lieutenant Meyer.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by historically accurate weaponry and equipment.
It is characterized by the slow motion during violent scenes.
It is characterized by its visual style.
It is characterized by its bleak, anti-war tone.
It is characterized by graphic mayhem.
It is characterized by its international co-production.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by The Wild Bunch.
It was influenced by All Quiet on the Western Front.
IsA: It is an international co-production between British and West German financiers.
It is a joint Anglo-German production.
It is a fictional work loosely based on the true story of Johann Schwerdfeger.
KnownAs: It is known as Steiner – Das Eiserne Kreuz.
KnownFor: It is known for its portrayal of the Eastern Front in World War II.
It is known for its depiction of class conflict.
It is known for its historically accurate weaponry and equipment.
It is known for its anti-war tone.
It is known for its graphic violence.
OccurredAt: It occurred at Pinewood Studios in England.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during World War II.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Trieste in Italy.
It occurred in Zagreb and Savudrija in Croatia.
OccurredOn: It occurred on the Eastern Front.
OccurredAround: It occurred around Obrov in Slovenia.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Wolf C. Hartwig.
It was produced by Alex Winitsky.
WrittenBy: It was written by Julius Epstein.
It was written by James Hamilton.
It was written by Walter Kelley.
